name: @pyreon/native-runtime-swift
description: PRIVATE / EXPERIMENTAL — Swift Package Manager package that compiler-emitted Swift code links against on iOS. Phase 0 scaffold; see .claude/plans/native-platforms-phase0-roadmap.md PR 1.

scripts.build: if [ "$(uname -s)" = Darwin ] && command -v swift >/dev/null 2>&1; then swift build; else echo '[native-runtime-swift] non-Darwin or no swift on PATH; skipping build (SwiftUI is Darwin-only)'; fi
scripts.test: if [ "$(uname -s)" = Darwin ] && command -v swift >/dev/null 2>&1; then swift test; else echo '[native-runtime-swift] non-Darwin or no swift on PATH; skipping tests (SwiftUI is Darwin-only)'; fi
scripts.lint: echo '[native-runtime-swift] SwiftLint not yet integrated; skipping lint'
scripts.typecheck: if [ "$(uname -s)" = Darwin ] && command -v swift >/dev/null 2>&1; then swift build; else echo '[native-runtime-swift] non-Darwin or no swift on PATH; skipping typecheck (SwiftUI is Darwin-only)'; fi
